sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt32, val String, val_float Float64) ENGINE = Memory;
SELECT id, toInt256OrDefault(val, CAST(0, 'Int256')) IN (SELECT toInt256OrDefault(val_float, CAST(1, 'Int256')) FROM test_table WHERE val_float IS NOT NULL) AS result FROM test_table;
SELECT id, val, toInt256OrDefault(val, CAST(NULL, 'Int256')) IN (SELECT DISTINCT toInt256OrDefault(val_float, -1) FROM test_table) AS nested_result FROM test_table WHERE id > 1;

SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS count_vals FROM (SELECT id, toInt256OrDefault(val, CAST(-1, 'Int256')) AS converted_val FROM test_table GROUP BY id HAVING converted_val IN (SELECT toInt256OrDefault(val_float, CAST(0, 'Int256')) FROM test_table WHERE val_float IS NOT NULL)) GROUP BY id;

SELECT id, COUNT(*) AS invalid_val_count FROM (SELECT id, toInt256OrDefault(val, CAST(-1, 'Int256')) AS converted_val FROM test_table WHERE converted_val = -1) GROUP BY id HAVING invalid_val_count > 0;
